Metadata.title: JeremyAI — Market Bias & Trading Intelligence
Metadata.description: AI-powered market bias analysis, news calendars, and trading education for CFD traders — from first timeframe to full strategy. Not financial advice.

Hero.mission: Our mission: the most trusted AI in trading education
Hero.disclaimer: Educational market intelligence — not financial advice
Hero.subtitle: JeremyAI reads bullish and bearish bias across every timeframe, tracks the full CFD news and economic calendar, and pairs it with an AI assistant that teaches you the "why" behind the market — never a signal to blindly follow.
Hero.ctaNote: Card required to start. First charge after your 7-day trial — cancel anytime.

Globe.title: An AI That Never Stops Watching the Market
Globe.body: London open, New York overlap, Tokyo close — JeremyAI tracks bias and news across every major session, so you're never reading a stale chart. One engine, every timezone, every timeframe.
Globe.point2: Built on the same instruments institutions watch
Globe.point3: Designed to explain, not to signal

Features.title: Everything you need to read the market, nothing that trades it for you
Features.subtitle: JeremyAI is built to make you a sharper trader — not to replace your judgment.
Features.biasBody: See whether a market is leaning bullish or bearish on the 5-minute, hourly, daily, and weekly chart at a glance — so you know if you're trading with the trend or against it.
Features.calendarBody: Every high-impact news release and economic event for the month and year ahead, filtered to the instruments you actually trade.
Features.assistantBody: Ask questions about structure, volatility, or your own strategy. JeremyAI explains the reasoning behind the market — it never tells you what to buy or sell.
Features.securityBody: Your account and conversation history are encrypted in transit and at rest, with the same access controls you'd expect from a financial platform.

Pricing.title: Start free. Stay if it's useful.
Pricing.subtitle: Every plan starts with a 7-day free trial. Add a card to begin — you won't be charged until the trial ends.

Outro.title: Get an Edge on Every Market
Outro.subtitle: JeremyAI — bias, calendar, and coaching in one place.

Footer.riskDisclosure: Risk Disclosure: CFDs are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. JeremyAI provides educational market analysis and general information only. Nothing on this site or produced by the AI assistant constitutes financial, investment, or trading advice, and JeremyAI is not a licensed financial advisor or broker. You are solely responsible for your own trading decisions.

Dashboard.biasSampleNote: Showing sample bias data. Add a FINNHUB_API_KEY to compute this live.
Dashboard.aiChatEmptySubtitle: Multi-timeframe analysis, risk management, the calendar — ask about anything on your workspace.
Dashboard.aiChatPreviewNote: Educational preview answers. Full AI responses activate once the assistant is connected.
Dashboard.aiChatError: Something went wrong — please try again.
Dashboard.aiSuggestion2: How should I think about risk management?
Dashboard.aiSuggestion3: How do I use the economic calendar?
Dashboard.aiFallback1: Multi-timeframe analysis works best when you let the higher timeframe set the trend and use the lower timeframe to time your entry. If the 4H and 1D disagree with the 5m, the higher timeframe usually wins over time.
Dashboard.aiFallback2: Position sizing matters more than most new traders think. A common approach is risking a small, fixed percentage of your account per trade — that way a losing streak doesn't wipe you out while you're still learning.
Dashboard.aiFallback3: The economic calendar is most useful for knowing when not to trade. High-impact events like an NFP release or a central bank rate decision can cause sudden volatility that has nothing to do with your technical setup.
Dashboard.aiFallback4: A trading journal is one of the most underrated tools. Logging why you entered a trade, not just the result, is what actually improves your decision-making over time.
Dashboard.aiFallback5: Bias isn't a signal to trade on its own — it's context. A bullish 4H bias means the higher timeframe favors buyers; how, or whether, you act on that is a separate decision involving risk, structure, and confirmation.
Dashboard.calendarSampleNote: Showing sample events. Add a market-data key to pull the live monthly and yearly calendar.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: JeremyAI ("JeremyAI," "we," "us") provides educational software that analyzes publicly available market data, displays an economic and news calendar, and offers an AI-powered chat assistant for learning about CFD markets ("the Service").
terms.s2_body1: JeremyAI is an educational and informational tool only. Nothing produced by the Service — including market bias indicators, the calendar, or any response from the AI assistant — is or should be construed as financial, investment, trading, tax, or legal advice, a recommendation to buy or sell any instrument, or a solicitation of any kind. JeremyAI is not a registered investment adviser, broker, or dealer in any jurisdiction.
terms.s2_body2: Trading CFDs carries a high level of risk and can result in losses that exceed your deposits. You are solely responsible for evaluating the merits and risks of any trading decision. See our
terms.s3_body: You must be at least 18 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction) and legally permitted to use trading-education software in your country of residence to create an account.
terms.s4_body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activity under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
terms.s5_item1: New accounts receive a 7-day free trial. No charge occurs until the trial ends, unless stated otherwise at signup.
terms.s5_item2: After the trial, your chosen payment method (Apple Pay or Google Pay) will be charged the then-current subscription price on a recurring basis until you cancel.
terms.s5_item3: Payments follow the refund policy stated at checkout.
terms.s5_item4: You can cancel anytime from account settings; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.
terms.s6_body: You agree not to misuse the Service, including attempting to reverse-engineer it, resell access, use it to break any law, or submit content to the AI assistant that is unlawful, infringing, or abusive.
terms.s7_body: The AI assistant can produce incomplete, outdated, or inaccurate information. It does not have access to your brokerage account and cannot place trades. Do not rely on it as your sole source of information for any decision.
terms.s8_body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available," without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. We do not warrant that market data, bias indicators, or the calendar are accurate, complete, or timely.
terms.s9_body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, JeremyAI and its owners, employees, and contractors will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, revenue, or trading losses, arising out of or related to your use of the Service, even if advised of the possibility of such damages. Our total liability for any claim relating to the Service will not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months before the claim arose.
terms.s10_body: To the extent permitted by applicable law, you release JeremyAI from any claims, damages, or losses arising from trading decisions you make, whether or not informed by the Service. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain liability limitations or waivers of consumer rights, so parts of this section may not apply to you.
terms.s11_body: [Placeholder — insert your chosen governing law, arbitration provider/rules if any, and venue once reviewed by counsel.]
terms.s12_body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_item1: Account data: name, email, hashed password, signup date.
privacy.s1_item2: Billing data: handled by our payment processor (Apple Pay / Google Pay via Stripe). We do not store raw card numbers.
privacy.s1_item3: Usage data: pages visited, features used, device/browser information.
privacy.s1_item4: AI assistant conversations: the messages you send to and receive from the AI assistant, stored to provide the Service, improve it, and for safety review.
privacy.s2_title: 2. Internal access to your AI conversations
privacy.s2_body: Authorized JeremyAI staff/administrators can access AI assistant conversation content through an internal dashboard, for purposes including: improving the assistant, investigating misuse or safety issues, and customer support. Conversations are not sold, and are not shared with other users. If you don't want a particular detail retained, don't share it with the assistant.
privacy.s3_item1: To provide and maintain the Service, including your market bias views, calendar, and AI conversations.
privacy.s3_item2: To process subscription billing and prevent fraud.
privacy.s3_item3: To improve the product, including analyzing aggregate usage and reviewing AI conversations for quality and safety.
privacy.s3_item4: To communicate with you about your account, security, and (if you opt in) product updates.
privacy.s4_body: Card-based payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay) are processed by Stripe. We receive confirmation of payment and a transaction reference, not your full payment credentials.
privacy.s5_body: We retain account and conversation data for as long as your account is active, plus a reasonable period after closure for legal, security, and dispute-resolution purposes. [Placeholder — set a specific retention window once finalized.]
privacy.s6_body: Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data, and to object to certain processing. Contact us to exercise these rights. [Placeholder — add GDPR/CCPA-specific language if you'll have EU/UK/California users.]
privacy.s7_body: We use encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest for stored data, and restrict internal access to conversation and account data to authorized personnel.
privacy.s8_body: The Service is not directed to individuals under 18.
privacy.s9_body: We may update this Privacy Policy; material changes will be notified via the Service or email.
privacy.s10_body: [Placeholder — insert privacy contact email and company entity name.]

risk.title: Risk Disclosure
risk.s1_body: Contracts for Difference (CFDs) are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. A majority of retail investor accounts lose money when trading CFDs. You should consider whether you understand how CFDs work and whether you can afford to take the high risk of losing your money.
risk.s2_title: JeremyAI does not manage your money or place trades
risk.s2_body: JeremyAI is not a broker. We do not hold client funds, execute trades, or manage any brokerage account on your behalf. Any bias indicator, calendar event, or AI assistant response is educational commentary based on available data, not an instruction to trade.
risk.s3_title: Past patterns don't guarantee future results
risk.s3_body: Market bias and historical patterns shown in the Service are descriptive, not predictive. Markets can and do move against established trends without warning.
risk.s4_title: The AI assistant can be wrong
risk.s4_body: The AI assistant is a language model. It can misinterpret data, omit important context, or generate incorrect statements. Verify anything important independently and do not treat its output as a guarantee of any outcome.
risk.s5_body: You are solely responsible for your own trading decisions, including position sizing, risk management, and whether to act on any information from the Service. Consider seeking independent, licensed financial advice before trading.

Billing.title: Add a Payment Method
Billing.subtitle: We'll save your card and start your 7-day free trial right away. You won't be charged until the trial ends, and you can cancel anytime before then.
Billing.notConfiguredBody: Your account was created, but we can't collect a payment method until billing is configured on our end. Please check back soon or contact support.
Billing.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Billing.securityNote: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. JeremyAI never sees your full card number.
Billing.encryptionNote: Your card details are encrypted and sent directly to Stripe. JeremyAI never sees or stores your full card number.
